title: psychotria sessilis var. hancorniifolia
intro: Psychotria sessilis var. hancorniifolia is a rare and lesser-known species of the Rubiaceae family, commonly referred to as a plant in the coffee family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria sessilis var. hancorniifolia include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, colds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
